channel.title: The Comeuppance Report
channel.description: Fictional dialogue-format dramas where bad choices meet records, witnesses, and consequences.

item.title: Cafe Owner's Wife Humiliated A New Part-Time Cashier In The Cafe Conversation. Then The Receipt Printer Got Quietly Loud.
item.description: A fictional cafe dialogue drama about a refund threat, a false tip accusation, and a receipt printer that exposed the record.

item.title: Power-Tripping Female Boss Fired The Quiet Night-Shift Worker In The Group Conversation. Then The Security Log Answered.
item.description: A fictional workplace dialogue drama about a group conversation firing and the security log that exposed the truth.

item.title: Refund-Demanding Cafe Regular Ate Every Bite, Demanded A Refund, And Forgot The Register Kept Receipts.
item.description: A fictional cafe dialogue drama about a refund demand and a receipt timeline.

item.title: Bitter HOA Neighbor Blocked A Single Dad's Driveway. The Building Manager Opened The Parking Records.
item.description: A fictional neighbor dispute dialogue drama about parking records and accountability.

item.title: Controlling Bride Demanded A Free Cake Redesign. The Baker Opened The Email Thread At The Family Meeting.
item.description: A fictional wedding dialogue drama about approved changes and email receipts.

item.title: Smug Group Leader Took Credit For The Whole Project. The File History Showed Who Built Every Slide.
item.description: A fictional school dialogue drama about contribution records and file history.
